chapters.content_preview: Traits of Asterisms  129  One born with Moon in "Vishakha" nakshatra is jealous,  greedy, active, clever at speech, engaged in querrels. One born  in "Anuradha" nakshatra is wealthy, lives in another country,  feels hungry too often and is roaming always.  ~.,.~:  ~
